title: ScrollBars
text: ScrollBars Determines the appearance of the entity scroll bars on components. ScrollBars = Narrow | Standard | Aligned Arguments Narrow —narrow scroll bars fit in the width of a single character cell, and can therefore be used on existing components. Standard —standard scroll bars have the Microsoft Windows standard width of a scroll bar. Although more attractive, they can be too wide for existing (crowded) components. Aligned —aligned scroll bars are standard Microsoft Windows scroll bars, rounded to the nearest whole cell width. Default value Standard File section [upi] Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
